cash_intro_1: Imali engokoqobo isetshenziselwe njengomali amakhulu eminyaka futhi isayinhlobo evame ukusetshenziswa yemali yengokoqobo emhlabeni wonke.
cash_intro_2: I-Bitcoin iyimali yedijithali eyasungulwa ngo-2009 esebenza ngokuzimela kunoma yimuphi uhulumeni noma isiphathimandla esiyinhloko.
cash_intro_3: Kodwa imali engokoqobo yehluke kanjani emali yedijithali efana ne-Bitcoin? Ake sihlole umehluko oyinhloko phakathi kwalezi zinhlobo ezimbili zemali: I-Bitcoin nemali engokoqobo.
point_1_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ingathunyelelwa noma kuphi emhlabeni ngokushesha nge-Inthanethi, ngenkathi imali engokoqobo idinga ukuba khona ngokwenyama noma abaphakathi abathembekile. Awukwazi ukuthumela imali nge-imeyili, kodwa ungathumela i-Bitcoin kunoma ubani onokuxhumana ne-Inthanethi ngemizuzu.
point_2_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza ngendlela efanayo emhlabeni wonke - azikho imingcele kunethiwekhi ye-Bitcoin. Imali engokoqobo ilinganiselwe yindawo, amazinga okushintshanisa, nokwamukelwa kwendawo. Zama ukusebenzisa amadola ase-US emaphandleni aseThayilandi noma ama-yen aseJapane emaphandleni aseMexico.
point_3_summary_1: Ohulumeni bangachitha futhi bavale imali engokoqobo ubusuku obubodwa ngezinqubomgomo zokuncishiswa kwemali, njengoba i-India yenza ngo-2016 lapho ivala amanothimali athile.
point_3_summary_2: Ngisho nangaphandle kokuvala amanothimali athile, ohulumeni behlisa njalo inani lemali engokoqobo ngenfleshini.
point_3_summary_3: I-Bitcoin ayikwazi ukuchithwa noma yimuphi uhulumeni noma isiphathimandla - ikhona kunethiwekhi yomhlaba wonke, engacentralized engenasizinda esisodwa esilawulayo.
point_4_summary_1: Imali engokoqobo ingakopishwa ngokukhohlisa, futhi ngokuvamile kunzima ukubona amanothimali amanga ngaphandle kwemishini ekhethekile. Ngisho nangezici zokuphepha, imali engokoqobo eyinkohliso iyaqhubeka nokusebenza. I-Bitcoin isebenzisa ubufakazi be-cryptographic obenza ukuphrinta ngokukhohlisa kungabi nako ngokomathemathiki.
point_5_summary_1: Imali engokoqobo ikhishwa futhi ilawulwa ohulumeni, abangaphrinta eyengeziwe ngokuthanda, bashintshe imiklamo, noma bamemezele ukuthi amanothimali athile angasasebenzi. I-Bitcoin isebenza kunethiwekhi engacentralized lapho kungekho siphathimandla esisodwa esinolawulo emalini noma emithethweni.
point_6_summary_1: Imali engokoqobo kumele igcinwe ngokwenyama, okuyenza ibe sengozini yokwebiwa, ukulahleka, umlilo, noma ukuthathwa. Izinani ezinkulu zidinga izinyathelo zokuphepha ezibizayo.
point_6_summary_3: usebenzisa uhlelo lokusebenza lweselula noma isikhwama esikhethekile, okukunika ukulawula okuphelele emalini yakho ngaphandle kwezingozi zokugcina ngokwenyama.
point_7_summary_1: Imali engokoqobo inamanani amancane - awukwazi ukuhlukanisa isenti ibe yizingxenye ezincane. I-Bitcoin ingahlukaniswa izingxenye ezingu-100 million ezincane ezibizwa ngokuthi ama-satoshi, okuvumela izinkokhelo ezincane kakhulu nezinkokhelo ezinembile zanoma yisiphi isamba.
